title: westringia senifolia
intro: Westringia senifolia, also known as the woolly westringia, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Westringia senifolia include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and promoting wound healing. The herbal preparations of Westringia senifolia include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally to reap its medicinal benefits.
